## Checklist

- [ ] No private data, credentials, raw ASIN exports, screenshots, supplier quotes, or customer records are included.
- [ ] Examples are anonymized.
- [ ] Missing evidence is labeled as P0 / P1 / P2 where relevant.
- [ ] The change preserves the distinction between facts, interpretation, risks, gaps, and decisions.
